'''âw-f-j''' ('''wafaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:finesse|finesse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:finesse|finesse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-f-j
|-
! Lemma
| wafaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wafajithi|wafajithi]] || [[word:wafajiji|wafajiji]] || [[word:wafajishi|wafajishi]] || [[word:wafaji|wafaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafajuthuth|wafajuthuth]] || [[word:wafajujuj|wafajujuj]] || [[word:wafajushush|wafajushush]] || [[word:wafaj|wafaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafajuthu|wafajuthu]] || [[word:wafajuju|wafajuju]] || [[word:wafajushu|wafajushu]] || [[word:wafaju|wafaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafajufuth|wafajufuth]] || [[word:wafajufuj|wafajufuj]] || [[word:wafajufush|wafajufush]] || [[word:wafajuf|wafajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wafajethe|wafajethe]] || [[word:wafajeje|wafajeje]] || [[word:wafajeshe|wafajeshe]] || [[word:wafaje|wafaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafajothoth|wafajothoth]] || [[word:wafajojoj|wafajojoj]] || [[word:wafajoshosh|wafajoshosh]] || [[word:wafaj|wafaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafajotho|wafajotho]] || [[word:wafajojo|wafajojo]] || [[word:wafajosho|wafajosho]] || [[word:wafajo|wafajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafajofoth|wafajofoth]] || [[word:wafajofoj|wafajofoj]] || [[word:wafajofosh|wafajofosh]] || [[word:wafajof|wafajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wafajĂŠthĂŠ|wafajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wafajĂŠjĂŠ|wafajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wafajĂŠshĂŠ|wafajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wafajĂŠ|wafajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafajathath|wafajathath]] || [[word:wafajajaj|wafajajaj]] || [[word:wafajashash|wafajashash]] || [[word:wafaj|wafaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafajatha|wafajatha]] || [[word:wafajaja|wafajaja]] || [[word:wafajasha|wafajasha]] || [[word:wafaja|wafaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafajafath|wafajafath]] || [[word:wafajafaj|wafajafaj]] || [[word:wafajafash|wafajafash]] || [[word:wafajaf|wafajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wafajasha|wafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowafajasha|gowafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwafajasha|gokiwafajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafajnĂŒsha|wafajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowafajnknĂŒsha|gowafajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafajnĂŒsha|gokiwafajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafajshĂ«sha|wafajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafajnkshĂ«sha|gowafajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafajshĂ«sha|gokiwafajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafajrosha|wafajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafajnkrosha|gowafajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafajrosha|gokiwafajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wafajmusha|wafajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafajnkmusha|gowafajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafajmusha|gokiwafajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wafajsherasha|wafajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowafajnksherasha|gowafajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwafajsherasha|gokiwafajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wafajngasha|wafajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowafajnkngasha|gowafajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwafajngasha|gokiwafajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wafajyasha|wafajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowafajnkyasha|gowafajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwafajyasha|gokiwafajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wafajyamasha|wafajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowafajnkyamasha|gowafajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwafajyamasha|gokiwafajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wafajnĂŒshĂ«sha|wafajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowafajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowafajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwafajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwafajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafajnĂŒrosha|wafajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafajnknĂŒrosha|gowafajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafajnĂŒrosha|gokiwafajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafajnĂŒmusha|wafajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafajnknĂŒmusha|gowafajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafajnĂŒmusha|gokiwafajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wafajshĂ«nĂŒsha|wafajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowafajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowafajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwafajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafajshĂ«rosha|wafajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafajnkshĂ«rosha|gowafajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafajshĂ«rosha|gokiwafajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafajshĂ«musha|wafajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafajnkshĂ«musha|gowafajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafajshĂ«musha|gokiwafajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wafajronĂŒsha|wafajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowafajnkronĂŒsha|gowafajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafajronĂŒsha|gokiwafajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wafajroshĂ«sha|wafajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowafajnkroshĂ«sha|gowafajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwafajroshĂ«sha|gokiwafajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafajromusha|wafajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafajnkromusha|gowafajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafajromusha|gokiwafajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wafajmunĂŒsha|wafajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowafajnkmunĂŒsha|gowafajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafajmunĂŒsha|gokiwafajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wafajmushĂ«sha|wafajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowafajnkmushĂ«sha|gowafajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwafajmushĂ«sha|gokiwafajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafajmurosha|wafajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafajnkmurosha|gowafajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafajmurosha|gokiwafajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wafaj|wafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠj|wĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howafaj|howafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠfĂŠj|howĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowafaj|hohowafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠfĂŠj|hohowĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwafaj|nĂŒwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŒwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwafaj|nĂŒnĂŒwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwafaj|nĂŻwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŻwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwafaj|nĂŻnĂŻwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠfĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwafaj|luwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠfĂŠj|luwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwafaj|luluwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠfĂŠj|luluwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwafaj|liwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠfĂŠj|liwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwafaj|liliwafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠfĂŠj|liliwĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowafaj|kowafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠfĂŠj|kowĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowafaj|kokowafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠfĂŠj|kokowĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewafaj|kewafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠfĂŠj|kewĂŠfĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewafaj|kekewafaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠfĂŠj|kekewĂŠfĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
